_metadata.description: File inventory for CDE Theme 1.4.2 Python 3 with ARM support
_metadata.purpose: Documents which files are needed vs unnecessary. Can be used to rollback file deletions.

categories.needed: File is actively used by the current Python 3 version of the theme
categories.unnecessary: File is not used and can be safely deleted
categories.keep_reference: File is not directly executed but is useful as documentation or reference

_metadata.rollback_instructions: To restore a deleted file, use git checkout or copy from backup. Each unnecessary file entry includes its size_bytes and relative_path for identification.

needed.reason: Production entry point shell script. Runs from source when scripts are newer or source is preferred; otherwise uses the PyInstaller binary when available.

WSL2+VcXsrv testing-only startup script. Not for distribution. Handles DISPLAY detection, forces X11 backend (unsets WAYLAND_DISPLAY), starts XFCE session, kills XFCE panel, launches CDE panel. Ctrl+C kills everything.
needed.note: For local WSL2 testing only. The production entry points are startpanel (x86_64) and cdepanel.py (ARM).

needed.reason: PyInstaller spec file for building the cdepanel binary
Desktop entry file for launching CDE Panel from DE menus
Theme icon/screenshot image
Installation script - handles system-wide and user installs on Linux, ARM, and Termux
Build script for creating PyInstaller binary on x86_64
Build script for creating PyInstaller binary on ARM
Python dependency list for pip install
GTK/icon theme index file - required by the theme system
Current project documentation covering runtime behavior, fixes, and build/testing instructions.
Termux feasibility analysis documentation
This file. Documents which files are needed vs unnecessary.
Symlink/placeholder to gtk-3.16 - needed for theme to appear in gnome-tweak
Reference documentation from Py2-to-Py3 migration process.
Documents the Python 2 to Python 3 migration and syntax error fixes.
Documents the cStringIO Python 2 to Python 3 migration fix.
Install guide from Py2-to-Py3 migration.
Old readme from original developer.
Documents the Python 2/PyQt4/GTK2 to Python 3/PyQt5/GTK4 migration.
Old readme from original developer.
Old install instructions from original developer.
CDE backdrop image files (.pm format) - used by ThemeBackdrops.py
GTK2 theme files - core theme data with img/ references
GTK3.16 theme CSS and assets
GTK3.20 theme CSS and assets
GTK4 theme CSS and assets
Theme images referenced by GTK2/GTK3 CSS files (arrows, scrollbar elements, etc.)
Additional theme images referenced by ColorDialog.py (colorset frames)
CDE color palette files (.dp) - used by MotifColors.py
Python source code and runtime resources for the active application.
XFCE window manager decoration images - core theme data
CDE-style freedesktop icon themes. Bundled NsCDE (GPL-3.0, ~7000 icons). Installed to ~/.local/share/icons/ on first run.
Old/obsolete readme and documentation files. Moved here from root and scripts/.

unnecessary.reason: IDE project files. Not needed by the theme.
Python virtual environment. Not needed for distribution.

needed_python_modules._description: Python modules that are imported and executed as part of the running application. Import chain: startpanel -> cdepanel.py -> all others.

files.reason: Main application source. Production entry point on ARM (run directly via startpanel). On x86_64 this is compiled into the cdepanel binary via PyInstaller.
cStringIO error prevention. Must be imported FIRST in cdepanel.py.
Image compatibility layer for PIL/Qt interop.
Platform detection (Termux/ARM) and path utilities.
Global variables and state shared across all modules.
Color manipulation and icon lookup functions. Wildcard-imported by cdepanel.py.
Shell command execution utilities. Wildcard-imported by many modules.
Custom QPainter subclass for drawing operations.
Options/configuration data class.
Base button widget class for the panel.
Command-executing button widget (includes PicButtonClock, PicButtonDate).
Toggle and workspace button widgets.
Vertical box layout container for panel buttons.
Drawer (popup menu) widget for the panel.
Workspace management, process execution, desktop entry launching, and EWMH integration.
Color picker dialog for theme customization.
Help dialog.
Auto-generated PyQt UI code for the color dialog.
Auto-generated PyQt UI code for the help dialog.
Motif/CDE color scheme generation and sprite-based image creation.
Main theme orchestrator - detects DE and delegates to specific theme modules.
Abstract base class for desktop environment themes.
Desktop environment detection (XFCE, LXQt, etc.).
GTK2/GTK3/GTK4 theme generation (gtkrc, CSS).
XFCE-specific theming (xfconf-query settings, backdrop style). Passes correct image-style for tiled vs stretched backdrops.
LXQt-specific theming.
Backdrop/wallpaper management for XFCE. Sets image-style (tiled=2 vs stretched=3) correctly via xfconf-query.
Shared constants for theme modules.
XFCE/xfwm4 window decoration image generation.
Openbox window manager theming for LXQt.
LXQt utility functions.
Sprite coordinate data for panel resource images.
Sprite coordinate data for GTK2 theme images.
Sprite coordinate data for GTK4 theme images.
Generates default panel layout and drawer menus from system .desktop files. Auto-detects calendar apps for clock/date buttons via xdg-mime and fallback chain.

needed_non_python_files.reason: Standalone script for applying themes without the panel app. Referenced in documentation.
Qt Designer UI file - source for ui_ColorDialog.py. Needed if UI needs regeneration.
Qt Designer UI file - source for ui_Help.py. Needed if UI needs regeneration.
Desktop entry file for CDE Panel.
Theme icon image, duplicate of root cdetheme.png.

needed_subdirectories.reason: Runtime configuration, layout files, drawer definitions, xpm icons, desktop entries, and default config. Copied to ~/.config/CdePanel on first run.
Bundled EWMH library for X window manager interaction. Imported by cdepanel.py and WorkspaceFuncs.py.

removed_directories: cde_rewrite/ (failed rewrite attempt; verified unused and deleted)
updated_files: cdepanel (removed checked-in binary; must be built locally on the user's system)
startpanel (1155 -> 1762 bytes, source-preference logic retained and documented)
file_inventory.json (removed deleted legacy_files entries and refreshed summary totals)
